raw_consumer_statement:
Frontier Airlines charged my Frontier Mastercard {$590.00} on XX/XX/year> for a XXXX XXXX  that I did not authorize, do not want, and do not have access to on my Frontier Airlines account. I disputed the charge with Mastercard and was temporarily credited the {$590.00}. Mastercard subsequently placed the {$590.00} charge back on my credit card and closed my dispute, referring me to Frontier Airlines for resolution. 

Frontier Airlines has refused to remove the {$590.00} charge and advised that they consider the matter " closed ''. I informed Frontier Airlines that the dispute with Mastercard is closed ; I never authorized this charge ; I never wanted another XXXX XXXX ; and I do not have access to a XXXX XXXX  on my account. 

I have been charged {$590.00} for something I never authorized or wanted and have evidence that I was never provided access to. This is criminal theft of funds!
